description_long: This is a chocolate muffin with a domed top, generously studded with dark chocolate chips. The muffin is encased in a brown, ridged paper wrapper that extends from the base to the sides, giving it a classic bakery appearance. The top surface is slightly cracked and uneven, with visible chocolate chips embedded throughout, adding texture and visual interest. The body of the muffin is a rich, deep brown, indicating a chocolate-flavored batter, and the wrapper appears slightly glossy from oil absorption. The bottom of the muffin is flat and shows the inner side of the wrapper, which is lighter in color. There are no visible decorative elements or frosting, and the muffin is shown isolated with no supporting surface.
description: A chocolate muffin with a domed top, chocolate chips, and a brown ridged paper wrapper. The surface is cracked and textured, with no frosting or extra decorations.
description_view_0: Bottom view showing the flat base and the inner side of the brown paper wrapper.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ridged brown wrapper and the domed top of the muffin.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the cracked surface and scattered chocolate chips.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wrapper and the chocolate chip-studded top.
